label: Trim
description: 砍 path 末尾 n 段，相同新 path 的 items 顺序合并；剩余 path 必须 ≥1。
description-en: Drop the last n segments of every path; items of newly-equal paths merge in order. Remaining path length must be ≥1.
icon: 一棵层级树图标，右侧最深一层 branch 被一把剪刀虚线剪掉，扁平插画风格，主色2种。

inputs.name: n
inputs.label: 层数
inputs.description-en: Number of trailing path segments to drop (≥0).
